biography: Joni, a celebrated name from Hill Side Golf Club, is known for his strategic prowess on the golf course and his calm demeanor under pressure. Off the course, Joni is known to be a reserved individual, preferring the quiet company of a good book to the hustle and bustle of social gatherings.
Joni has graced the Hector Trophée with his presence on one occasion, securing a memorable victory. While he has yet to claim the Victor Trophy, his performance has always been one to watch.

Currently considered retired from Hector Trophée events, the possibility remains open for a surprise return. Should he decide to compete again, the tournament would undoubtedly benefit from his experience and competitive spirit.
